Package sudoku.generation.symmetry

package sudoku.generation.symmetry
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    sudoku.generation
     
  • Classes
    Class
    Description
    AbstractSymmetry
    Represents the traditional symmetric pattern of the Sudoku puzzle to be generated.
    DihedralSymmetry
    The puzzle is to be symmetric both rotationally and reflectionally.
    NoSymmetry
    There is to be no enforced symmetry in the puzzle.
    ReflectionalSymmetry
    The givens are mirrored vertically, creating identical left-to-right halves.
    RotationalSymmetry
    Two-fold (180 degree) rotation: the grid looks the same if you turn it completely upside down.
